criterion: scale carrier must not use vobs, endpoint residuals, or endpoint scores
warp/asymmetry scale must carry the measured source onset x_w
dimensionful carrier should be a source/catalog asymptotic readout scale, not a point-sampled median curve statistic
scale should not require a TPG-like v_v6 closure carrier as the normalizer
scale should not multiply independent onset and closure fractions unless Tau-side theory derives the composite
